description: Target chain (mainnet, arbitrum, optimism, ...)
Machine-readable JSON output on stdout. After the command name, pass --json <fields> or --json=<fields> to select top-level fields.
Select specific JSON fields (comma-separated, implies --json)
Render structured output through a lightweight Mustache-style template with {{path.to.value}} placeholders and {{#items}}...{{/items}} list iteration
Output format: table (default), csv, json, yaml, wide, name
Skip confirmation prompts
Open the primary explorer or portal link in your browser when available
Show condensed command help (default)
Show full command help with examples, safety notes, and JSON fields
Override RPC URL
Machine-friendly mode (alias for --json --yes --quiet)
Suppress human-oriented stderr output
Disable ASCII banner output
Enable verbose/debug output (-v info, -vv debug, -vvv trace)
Suppress spinners/progress indicators (useful in CI)
Suppress header rows in CSV and wide/tabular table output
Network/transaction timeout in seconds (default: 30)
Filter JSON output with a JMESPath expression (implies --json)
Compatibility alias for --jmes (JMESPath, not jq syntax)
Disable colored output (also respects NO_COLOR env var)
Use a named profile (separate wallet identity and config)
